# AkiliNest
> Thinking-first creative intelligence for children aged 6-17 in Nairobi, Kenya.

AkiliNest is a creative studio in Nairobi that trains children to think first, create boldly, and use AI wisely. Four age-based programmes: Sprouts (6-8), Explorers (9-11), Builders (12-14), Innovators (15-17). Holiday camps and parent series available.

## Key Pages
- Programs: https://akilinest.co.ke/programme
- About: https://akilinest.co.ke/about
- Contact: https://akilinest.co.ke/contact
- Blog: https://akilinest.co.ke/blog
- FAQ: https://akilinest.co.ke/faq
- Events: https://akilinest.co.ke/events
- Parent Series: https://akilinest.co.ke/pis
- Parents Guide: https://akilinest.co.ke/parents-guide
- Future Skills Report: https://akilinest.co.ke/future-skills-report
